title: NIIT is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NIIT is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
